bookkeeping.note: The installed DFHack API did not establish a stable direct mapping from bookkeeping metadata to the visible rounded stock estimate; approximate values are therefore null.

definitions.category: Each usable item contributes its stack size to at most one category. Containers are not added to the category of their contents.
definitions.excluded: Items assigned to the first matching exclusion reason in deterministic priority order.
definitions.total: All scanned IN_PLAY item objects and their stack quantities, before exclusions.
definitions.usable: Items not rotten, dumped, forbidden, construction, or trader; ownership, containment, and in-inventory state are reported but do not change the dfstatus-compatible baseline.

unsupported: Visible game-style approximate counts are not emitted until the bookkeeping rounding algorithm is verified against the live UI.
Uncategorized usable quantity is retained instead of guessing a category from descriptions.
Squad-equipment assignment was not reliably distinguished from general in-inventory state and does not drive exclusions.
